TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: bniru:Sabi Nobu smi squ sabu qba, gitan qrapit, mqas balay kwara squ seto mcqbaq son nanu kbalay qrapit, maki squ pincbaqan ni sinsi. baqun nha qrapit qani ga pinbahuw na cinqalang, sinnlwan nha mha spwah squ knalay na seto nanak ru baqun nha puqing galan na nniqun. musa nha baqun nanu cbaq zywaw na puqing kyo'ik nqu nniqun pinbahuw, Sin'igo ga u'buy squ pinbahuw qu piyang balay qqnxan, yan na pinbahuw ga piyang balay ga ume qu galan nha, nasun nha kwara squ zenko galan nha ume. aki baqun nqu seto ga aring cipuq cinqalang nha nanak. nanu Sin'i nqu pqwasan biru laqi cikuy qani ga tpihan nqu aring squ Sin'igo na nokay mwah squ pqwasan biru laqi cikuy. mwah tcqbaq cyo_ik nqu pinbahuw, ahi baqun nqu lelaqi son nanu mlahang ru cukaw rhiyal, ru musa klabang kinlokah squ sinrxan nanak. zywaw nqu cyo'ik pinbahuw qani ga, llgan naha ru pngsa squ bunka na Bunun zok, ahi naha baqun squ seto sinrxan nha nanak, musa sgsu ru sinlokah mha aki musa lemuruw sinhluyan na qalang naha, ru lemaras squ zywaw nqu kinlokah ru lemeliq nqu kezay na qalang naha.
S.PHON: βniru:s~ɕaβi noβu s~ɕmi s~ɕqu s~ɕaβu qβa, ɣitan qrapit, mqas~ɕ βalaj kwara s~ɕqu s~ɕeto mʦ~ʨqβaq s~ɕon nanu kβalaj qrapit, maki s~ɕqu pinʦ~ʨβaqan ni s~ɕins~ɕi. βaqun nħa qrapit qani ɣa pinβaħuw na ʦ~ʨinqalaŋ, s~ɕinnlwan nħa mħa s~ɕpwaħ s~ɕqu knalaj na s~ɕeto nanak ru βaqun nħa puqiŋ ɣalan na nniqun. mus~ɕa nħa βaqun nanu ʦ~ʨβaq zjwaw na puqiŋ kjoʔik nqu nniqun pinβaħuw, s~ɕinʔiɣo ɣa uʔβuj s~ɕqu pinβaħuw qu pijaŋ βalaj qqnxan, jan na pinβaħuw ɣa pijaŋ βalaj ɣa ume qu ɣalan nħa, nas~ɕun nħa kwara s~ɕqu zenko ɣalan nħa ume. aki βaqun nqu s~ɕeto ɣa ariŋ ʦ~ʨipuq ʦ~ʨinqalaŋ nħa nanak. nanu s~ɕinʔi nqu pqwas~ɕan βiru laqi ʦ~ʨikuj qani ɣa tpiħan nqu ariŋ s~ɕqu s~ɕinʔiɣo na nokaj mwaħ s~ɕqu pqwas~ɕan βiru laqi ʦ~ʨikuj. mwaħ tʦ~ʨqβaq ʦ~ʨjoəik nqu pinβaħuw, aħi βaqun nqu lelaqi s~ɕon nanu mlaħaŋ ru ʦ~ʨukaw rħijal, ru mus~ɕa klaβaŋ kinlokaħ s~ɕqu s~ɕinrxan nanak. zjwaw nqu ʦ~ʨjoʔik pinβaħuw qani ɣa, llɣan naħa ru pŋs~ɕa s~ɕqu βunka na βunun zok, aħi naħa βaqun s~ɕqu s~ɕeto s~ɕinrxan nħa nanak, mus~ɕa s~ɕɣs~ɕu ru s~ɕinlokaħ mħa aki mus~ɕa lemuruw s~ɕinħlujan na qalaŋ naħa, ru lemaras~ɕ s~ɕqu zjwaw nqu kinlokaħ ru lemeliq nqu kezaj na qalaŋ naħa.
S.FORM: bniru:Sabi Nobu smi squ sabu qba, gitan qrapit, mqas balay kwara squ seto mcqbaq son nanu kbalay qrapit, maki squ pincbaqan ni sinsi. baqun nha qrapit qani ga pinbahuw na cinqalang, sinnlwan nha mha spwah squ knalay na seto nanak ru baqun nha puqing galan na nniqun. musa nha baqun nanu cbaq zywaw na puqing kyo'ik nqu nniqun pinbahuw, Sin'igo ga u'buy squ pinbahuw qu piyang balay qqnxan, yan na pinbahuw ga piyang balay ga ume qu galan nha, nasun nha kwara squ zenko galan nha ume. aki baqun nqu seto ga aring cipuq cinqalang nha nanak. nanu Sin'i nqu pqwasan biru laqi cikuy qani ga tpihan nqu aring squ Sin'igo na nokay mwah squ pqwasan biru laqi cikuy. mwah tcqbaq cyo_ik nqu pinbahuw, ahi baqun nqu lelaqi son nanu mlahang ru cukaw rhiyal, ru musa klabang kinlokah squ sinrxan nanak. zywaw nqu cyo'ik pinbahuw qani ga, llgan naha ru pngsa squ bunka na Bunun zok, ahi naha baqun squ seto sinrxan nha nanak, musa sgsu ru sinlokah mha aki musa lemuruw sinhluyan na qalang naha, ru lemaras squ zywaw nqu kinlokah ru lemeliq nqu kezay na qalang naha.
S.PHON: βniru:s~ɕaβi noβu s~ɕmi s~ɕqu s~ɕaβu qβa, ɣitan qrapit, mqas~ɕ βalaj kwara s~ɕqu s~ɕeto mʦ~ʨqβaq s~ɕon nanu kβalaj qrapit, maki s~ɕqu pinʦ~ʨβaqan ni s~ɕins~ɕi. βaqun nħa qrapit qani ɣa pinβaħuw na ʦ~ʨinqalaŋ, s~ɕinnlwan nħa mħa s~ɕpwaħ s~ɕqu knalaj na s~ɕeto nanak ru βaqun nħa puqiŋ ɣalan na nniqun. mus~ɕa nħa βaqun nanu ʦ~ʨβaq zjwaw na puqiŋ kjoʔik nqu nniqun pinβaħuw, s~ɕinʔiɣo ɣa uʔβuj s~ɕqu pinβaħuw qu pijaŋ βalaj qqnxan, jan na pinβaħuw ɣa pijaŋ βalaj ɣa ume qu ɣalan nħa, nas~ɕun nħa kwara s~ɕqu zenko ɣalan nħa ume. aki βaqun nqu s~ɕeto ɣa ariŋ ʦ~ʨipuq ʦ~ʨinqalaŋ nħa nanak. nanu s~ɕinʔi nqu pqwas~ɕan βiru laqi ʦ~ʨikuj qani ɣa tpiħan nqu ariŋ s~ɕqu s~ɕinʔiɣo na nokaj mwaħ s~ɕqu pqwas~ɕan βiru laqi ʦ~ʨikuj. mwaħ tʦ~ʨqβaq ʦ~ʨjoəik nqu pinβaħuw, aħi βaqun nqu lelaqi s~ɕon nanu mlaħaŋ ru ʦ~ʨukaw rħijal, ru mus~ɕa klaβaŋ kinlokaħ s~ɕqu s~ɕinrxan nanak. zjwaw nqu ʦ~ʨjoʔik pinβaħuw qani ɣa, llɣan naħa ru pŋs~ɕa s~ɕqu βunka na βunun zok, aħi naħa βaqun s~ɕqu s~ɕeto s~ɕinrxan nħa nanak, mus~ɕa s~ɕɣs~ɕu ru s~ɕinlokaħ mħa aki mus~ɕa lemuruw s~ɕinħlujan na qalaŋ naħa, ru lemaras~ɕ s~ɕqu zjwaw nqu kinlokaħ ru lemeliq nqu kezaj na qalaŋ naħa.
